subcodes.first_line: My Most Exalted Pen beareth witness that thou hast turned unto Him and attained unto the blessed spot wherefrom was raised His Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد قلمی الاعلی بانک اقبلت الیه و وردت البقعه المبارکه التی فیها ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
